name: ghostcommit
displayName: GhostCommit - Auto Commits and GitHub Shadow Tracker
description: Voce programa em projetos pessoais mas esquece de publicar no GitHub? Isso faz seu perfil parecer vazio. O GhostCommit faz auto commits automaticos (shadow commits) para mostrar que voce esta ativo, mesmo em projetos que nunca sao publicados. Instala, programa normalmente, e seu grafico de contribuicoes do GitHub fica verdinho todo dia. Feito para quem programa por diversao mas quer um GitHub bonito.

commands.title: ghostcommit: Add Current Project to Blacklist

ghostcommit.shadowRepoName.description: Name of the private shadow repository for activity logs

ghostcommit.flushInterval.description: Minutes of inactivity before auto-committing session data

ghostcommit.changeThreshold.description: Number of file changes (saves, AI writes, file creates) before auto-committing

ghostcommit.autoStart.description: Start tracking automatically when VS Code opens

enumDescriptions: AI suggests, you Accept/Edit/Generic at commit time
No AI, generic messages like 'Coding session Â· N files'

ghostcommit.autoPush.description: Push profile README updates automatically without asking

ghostcommit.projectBlacklist.description: Full paths of project folders to obfuscate in shadow commits (ex: D:\Projects\Secret). Activity still tracked, but project name hidden as [private]

ghostcommit.template.description: SVG template style for the profile README
